scripts.build:native-filter: c++ -std=c++17 -O2 -o native/filters/filter_pending native/filters/filter_pending.cpp && c++ -std=c++17 -O2 -o native/filters/filter_accepted native/filters/filter_accepted.cpp && c++ -std=c++17 -O2 -o native/filters/filter_rejected native/filters/filter_rejected.cpp
scripts.build:native-appointments: c++ -std=c++17 -O2 -o native/appointments/save_request native/appointments/save_request.cpp native/appointments/AppointmentRequest.cpp && c++ -std=c++17 -O2 -o native/appointments/list_appointments native/appointments/list_appointments.cpp && c++ -std=c++17 -O2 -o native/appointments/search_appointments native/appointments/search_appointments.cpp && c++ -std=c++17 -O2 -o native/appointments/update_appointment native/appointments/update_appointment.cpp && c++ -std=c++17 -O2 -o native/appointments/clinic_schedule_tool native/appointments/clinic_schedule_tool.cpp && c++ -std=c++17 -O2 -o native/appointments/count_by_status native/appointments/count_by_status.cpp
